title: ai-native-memory — the plugin's own frozen semantics
verify_note: tests/oracle-plugin-contract.mjs is the terminating oracle for this contract and runs the five focused checks for its frozen semantics.

exit_code_meaning.0: clean / GRANTED — no FAIL findings, or comprehension gate passed
exit_code_meaning.1: cannot-run — malformed input, unreadable file, or (gate.mjs only) authority hash drift
exit_code_meaning.2: findings present / DENIED — audit.mjs or verify.mjs found at least one FAIL, or gate.mjs rejected at least one comprehension check
